name: Bogeys 757
about: Bogeys 757 is a multi-venue golf entertainment center featuring an indoor golf simulator, an 18-hole putt putt course, and outdoor putting greens. The facility offers hourly rentals and monthly memberships for its simulator, which includes access to 25 different virtual courses. It also provides event hosting options for birthdays, graduations, and corporate functions. The venue operates Wednesday through Friday from 3pm-9pm and Saturday through Sunday from 12pm-9pm, with occasional closures for private events.
why_golfers_like_it: Variety of golf experiences with both simulator and real putting options
Flexible booking with hourly rentals and monthly memberships
Suitable for hosting private events and group outings
Multiple course options available on the simulator
Dedicated practice areas with outdoor putting greens

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available, so bringing your own clubs is recommended for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and drinks are available at the venue, but it's not explicitly stated whether outside food and drinks are permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The venue does not provide specific time estimates for playing 18 holes on the simulator.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bogeys 757 is kid-friendly, with a specific kids admission rate for children under 10 and an 18-hole putt putt course suitable for families.
